---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap (e.g. "I can't do X...").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Additional context**
Any mockups, links, or examples that help illustrate the idea.
